analysis_summary: This video shows a virtual reality or computer simulation exercise involving finding numbered boxes with a scope tool. This is not one of the five standardized FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) tasks: Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture. The video appears to be a training exercise for scope navigation or hand-eye coordination but does not match any official FLS scoring rubric.
reason_not_scorable: Content is not an official FLS/MISTELS task
